summary: Google OAuth and Notification System activation testing COMPLETE. All 15/16 backend tests passed (1 skipped due to rate limiting). Frontend UI tests verified: Google login button, auth redirect to auth.emergentagent.com, notification bell and panel, standard email/password auth, registration with phone field, password hint 'En az 8 karakter'.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/google without session_id returns 400
Backend: POST /api/auth/google with empty session_id returns 400
Backend: POST /api/auth/google with invalid session_id returns 401/502
Backend: POST /api/auth/google endpoint exists (not 404)
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with phone field works
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials works
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with wrong password returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with short password (<8 chars) returns error
Backend: GET /api/stats returns dashboard data
Backend: GET /api/cars returns list
Backend: GET /api/customers returns list
Backend: GET /api/transactions returns list
Backend: GET /api/appointments returns list
Backend: POST /api/customers creates customer
Backend: GET /api/year-end-transfers works for admin
Frontend: Login page shows 'Google ile Giriş Yap' button with Google SVG icon
Frontend: Google button click redirects to https://auth.emergentagent.com/?redirect=...
Frontend: Login page shows 'veya' divider between Google and email form
Frontend: Toggle between 'Giriş Yap' and 'Hesap Oluştur' (Kayıt Ol) works
Frontend: Register mode shows company name field (data-testid='company-name-input')
Frontend: Register mode shows phone field with * required (data-testid='phone-input')
Frontend: Password hint 'En az 8 karakter' visible in register mode
Frontend: Standard email/password registration works (creates user, shows verification code)
Frontend: Email verification with MOCKED code works
Frontend: Notification bell icon visible in header (data-testid='notifications-btn')
Frontend: Notification panel opens when bell clicked (data-testid='notifications-panel')
Frontend: Notification panel shows 'Bildirim bulunmuyor' when empty
Frontend: Live clock visible in header (data-testid='live-clock')
Frontend: Dashboard loads with stats cards (TOPLAM GELİR, TOPLAM GİDER, etc.)
Frontend: Sidebar navigation items all visible (Stok Araçlar, Müşteriler, Randevular, Gelir & Gider, Yıl Sonu Devri)
critical_code_review_comments: Google OAuth flow correctly implemented: button redirects to auth.emergentagent.com with redirect URL encoded
Backend /api/auth/google endpoint properly validates session_id (400 if missing, 401 if invalid)
Notification system in Header.jsx correctly filters appointments for today/tomorrow/reminder dates
notifications.js has proper browser notification API with permission request and sendLocalNotification
Download helpers in helpers.js use blob URLs correctly (no about:blank issue)
LoginPage.jsx has proper OAuth callback handler using window.location.hash for session_id extraction
hasProcessedOAuth ref prevents duplicate OAuth callback processing
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with unique timestamps
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google OAuth flow: Click 'Google ile Giriş Yap' → redirects to auth.emergentagent.com → after Google auth, returns with #session_id=XXX → frontend extracts and calls POST /api/auth/google → backend validates with Emergent Auth → returns JWT. Notification bell in header shows upcoming appointments (today/tomorrow/reminder_date matches). Browser push notifications use Notification API with permission request. Download functions use blob URLs to avoid about:blank issue.

mocked_apis.Email sending: MOCKED - verification code returned in register response and displayed on screen
mocked_apis.Google OAuth: NOT MOCKED - real integration with auth.emergentagent.com (but requires real Google account to complete flow)

download_fix.helpers: downloadBlob and openPrintableHTML use blob URLs
download_fix.success_feedback: İndirildi! shown after Word export completes
